body.title: Goals->intentions remove-behind: purge goal language from remaining 8 skill files
body.text:
# D-goals-purge-remaining-skills-2026-06-26
**title:** Goals->intentions remove-behind: purge goal language from remaining 8 skill files
**date:** 2026-06-26
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-skills-workflow-goal-purge, T-skills-goal-skills-retire, T-skills-audit-design-goal-reframe, T-skills-kr-references-purge, T-consequence-goals-purge-remaining-skills

## Intention (root)
I intend that skills (CC's substrate) no longer reference the retired G-xxx goal system anywhere in live prompts — leaving only historical records intact.

## Decision narrative
The goals->IBD migration (D-intention-based-development-2026-06-04) captured the decision but ran only the copy-forward (intention field added). The remove-behind never ran. T-skills-goals-to-intentions (L, already filed under D-proof-on-close-2026-06-20) covers sorted/context-load/day-close + schema. THIS decision covers the 8 remaining skill files with live goal-language: workflow.md (goals tracking block), audit-design (Check 1 'goal'), audit-goal+goal (whole skills, delete), outcome/eval-run/weekly-retro (KR references). Design constraint from this session: goals' 3 functions are REDISTRIBUTED not renamed — (1) provable/disprovable is already in intention+proof-on-close; (2) KR progress tracking is DROPPED (weekly things weren't happening; intentions as living entities handle evolution differently); (3) capability snapshot (eval-run) survives but decoupled from G-xxx. The 'intentions as living entities' architecture (compete/merge/fold) is captured in memory [[intentions-as-living-entities]] and is a SEPARATE future design.

## Hypothesis
After these ship, grep -rl 'G-xxx|Which goal|palace.goals|/audit-goal|audit-goal challenge' skills/ returns 0 live-prompt matches; /workflow has no Goals block; /goal and /audit-goal skills don't exist; audit-design Check 1 prompts for intention not goal.

## Measurement Signal
grep -rIl 'G-xxx|palace.goals|audit-goal' skills/ -> 0. Bash-checkable post-sprint in 2 seconds.

## Goal Link
none: goals are retired — this IS the goal-retirement remove-behind.
